allow: PowerShell(cd "I:\\GitHub\\football-auto-broadcast-\\services\\ingest-streaming-module\\bin"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Minimized .\\mediamtx.exe -ArgumentList "mediamtx_8554.yml"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Minimized .\\mediamtx.exe -ArgumentList "mediamtx_8555.yml"; Start-Sleep 3; $proc = Start-Process -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\a_module_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\a_module_err.txt" .\\ingest-streaming-module.exe; Start-Sleep 15; if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\a_module_err.txt" -Tail 60 } else { Write-Host "Process exited early"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\a_module_err.txt" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 5; try { $status = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8081/api/v1/ingest/status" -TimeoutSec 5; $d = $status.data; Write-Host "A status: $\($d.status\) | cam_01: $\($d.cam_01_status\) | cam_02: $\($d.cam_02_status\) | fps: $\($d.cam_01_fps\)/$\($d.cam_02_fps\)" } catch { Write-Host "A not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "ffmpeg" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = $_; $parent = \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).ParentProcessId; Write-Host "ffmpeg PID=$\($p.Id\) ParentPID=$parent Name=$\(\(Get-Process -Id $parent -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName\)" })
PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -eq "192.168.10.20" } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress, PrefixLength)
PowerShell(netsh interface ip delete address "以太网 2" 169.254.205.1 2>$null)
